---
id: get-balance
title: "Get cash balance by account and currency"
description: "Returns the cash balance for a specific account and currency on the given date."
sidebar_label: "Get cash balance by account and currency"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get cash balance by account and currency"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/cash/balances/{accountId}/{currency}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the cash balance for a specific account and currency on the given date.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
